business.name: Ron's junk removal
business.tagline: We haul it all so you don't have to

hero.headline: Got junk? *We'll take it*
hero.subheadline: From old furniture to construction debris — one call clears it all

services_section.label: WHAT WE HAUL
services_section.heading: No job too big, too small, or too weird
services_section.subheading: From single items to full cleanouts

services.title: Furniture Removal
services.description: Old couches, mattresses, dining sets — we load it up and haul it away.

services.title: Appliance Pickup
services.description: Refrigerators, washers, dryers, and that ancient water heater in the basement.

services.title: Construction Debris
services.description: Demo waste, drywall scraps, flooring remnants from your latest project.

services.title: Yard Waste Cleanup
services.description: Brush piles, fallen branches, and everything from your weekend cleanup.

about.heading: We're the Florence team that shows up
about.body: Real people with real trucks answering the phone. One call, one crew, one less headache for you.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Florence and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Ready to clear it out?
